# Diego Pasaye

> Diego Pasaye is a software-engineering student and junior frontend engineer based in Morelia, Michoacán, México, building accessible, performant web interfaces with React and Next.js.

## About

- [Diego Pasaye — Portfolio](https://diegopasaye.dev): Single-page portfolio covering Diego Pasaye's bio, skills, projects, and work experience as a junior frontend engineer in Morelia, México.

## Projects

- [Nakawé](https://diegopasaye.dev/#projects): Web project built in contribution to a foundation supporting artisans (artesanos) of México. Built with React/Next.js by Diego Pasaye.
- [Pladiermo](https://diegopasaye.dev/#projects): Web development project delivered by Diego Pasaye as part of his professional frontend work.

## Experience

- [Work Experience](https://diegopasaye.dev/#experience): ~4 months developing a web project for the Contraloría Municipal de Morelia, plus ~10 months building a web project with a foundation supporting Mexican artisans. ~8 months total professional experience, ~4 years coding overall.

## Key Facts

- Name: Diego Pasaye
- Role: Software-engineering student and junior frontend engineer
- Location: Morelia, Michoacán, México
- Education: Universidad Tecnológica de Morelia (TI / Tecnologías de la Información)
- Experience: ~4 years coding, ~8 months professional
- Core skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js
- Notable projects: Nakawé (artisan foundation), Pladiermo
- Available for: junior frontend / web development roles

## Contact

- Website: https://diegopasaye.dev
